title.hr: Hrescic Studija Slučaja | Turizam i Putovanja

metaTitle.hr: Hrescic Studija Slučaja | Turizam i Putovanja

metaDescription.en: Building a scalable medical & cosmetic ecosystem across three brands, without fragmenting trust, traffic, or revenue.
metaDescription.hr: Izgradnja skalabilnog medicinskog i kozmetičkog ekosustava kroz tri brenda, bez fragmentiranja povjerenja.

heading.en: Building a scalable medical & cosmetic ecosystem across three brands, without fragmenting trust, traffic, or revenue
heading.hr: Izgradnja skalabilnog medicinskog i kozmetičkog ekosustava kroz tri brenda, bez fragmentiranja povjerenja, prometa ili prihoda

introHeading.en: This project was not about marketing execution.
introHeading.hr: Ovaj projekt nije bio o marketinškoj izvedbi.

introSubtext.en: It was about building a coherent, scalable medical and cosmetic ecosystem, without losing trust, SEO equity, or clinical authority.
introSubtext.hr: Radilo se o izgradnji koherentnog, skalabilnog medicinskog i kozmetičkog ekosustava, bez gubitka povjerenja, SEO kapitala ili kliničkog autoriteta.

intro.en: As the ecosystem grew, structural weaknesses became visible. What initially appeared as a need for marketing support revealed a deeper challenge: rapid expansion without a shared strategic backbone.
intro.hr: Kako se ekosustav širio, strukturne slabosti su postale vidljive. Ono što se u početku činilo kao potreba za marketinškom podrškom otkrilo je dublji izazov: brzo širenje bez zajedničke strateške osnove.

introSubtext.en: This was not three separate projects. The real task was to build one coherent brand ecosystem around a single medical authority, while simultaneously scaling traffic, conversions, and product and service expansion.
introSubtext.hr: Ovo nisu bila tri odvojena projekta. Pravi zadatak bio je izgraditi jedan koherentan brendovski ekosustav oko jednog medicinskog autoriteta, dok se istovremeno skalira promet, konverzije i širenje proizvoda i usluga.

issues.en: A highly complex and fragile SEO system, with over 2,000 URLs on Poliderma alone
issues.hr: Visoko složen i osjetljiv SEO sustav, s više od 2.000 URL-ova samo na Polidermi

issues.en: Multiple brands competing for attention instead of reinforcing one another
issues.hr: Više brendova koji se natječu za pažnju umjesto da se međusobno pojačavaju

issues.en: Long, inefficient user journeys across platforms
issues.hr: Dugi, neučinkoviti korisnici putovanja na svim platformama

issues.en: Strong medical authority that was not fully translated into scalable digital growth
issues.hr: Snažan medicinski autoritet koji nije u potpunosti preveden u skalabilni digitalni rast

conclusion.en: This was not three separate projects. The real task was to build one coherent brand ecosystem around a single medical authority, while simultaneously scaling traffic, conversions, and product and service expansion.
conclusion.hr: Ovo nisu bila tri odvojena projekta. Pravi zadatak bio je izgraditi jedan koherentan brendovski ekosustav oko jednog medicinskog autoriteta, dok se istovremeno skalira promet, konverzije i širenje proizvoda i usluga.

subheading.en: We treated the collaboration as ecosystem architecture, not campaign-based marketing.
subheading.hr: Suradnju smo tretirali kao arhitekturu ekosustava, a ne kao marketinške kampanje.

title.hr: Kirurška restructurizacija web stranice i sadržaja (Poliderma)

intro.en: Poliderma required precision rather than disruption:
intro.hr: Poliderma je zahtijevala preciznost umjesto disrupcije:

items.en: Preserving high-ranking URLs and accumulated SEO equity
items.hr: Čuvanje visoko rangiranih URL-ova i nakupljenog SEO kapitala

items.en: Modernizing UX without impacting Google visibility or patient trust
items.hr: Modernizacija UX-a bez utjecaja na vidljivost na Googleu ili povjerenje pacijenata

title.hr: Strateška izgradnja brenda i sadržaja (Regenerativna medicina)

intro.en: For the regenerative medicine vertical, we delivered:
intro.hr: Za vertikalu regenerativne medicine, isporučili smo:

items.en: Clear separation from cosmetic dermatology, without breaking authority signals
items.hr: Jasno odvajanje od kozmetičke dermatologije, bez narušavanja signala autoriteta

items.en: Educational, trust-driven content aligned with clinical credibility
items.hr: Obrazovni, povjerenjem vođen sadržaj usklađen s kliničkim kredibilitetom

intro.en: The MySkin webshop was rebuilt around conversion logic and trust:
intro.hr: MySkin webshop je obnovljen oko logike konverzije i povjerenja:

items.hr: Potpuni redizajn UX-a i korisničkog putovanja

items.en: Dramatically shortened path from first visit to purchase
items.hr: Drastično skraćena putanja od prvog posjeta do kupnje

items.en: Introduction of educational and reference-based content
Product naming, packaging guidance, and portfolio structuring
items.hr: Imenovanje proizvoda, smjernice za pakiranje i strukturiranje portfelja

title.hr: Marketing i oglašavanje usklađeni sa strategijom

intro.en: All marketing activities were aligned with real operational capacity:
intro.hr: Sve marketinške aktivnosti bile su usklađene s realnim operativnim kapacitetima:

items.en: Paid campaigns designed for actual treatment availability
items.hr: Plaćene kampanje dizajnirane za stvarnu dostupnost tretmana

items.en: Unified messaging across clinic, treatments, and products
items.hr: Ujedinjene poruke u klinici, tretmanima i proizvodima

items.en: Continuous optimization across all three brands

subtext.en: What emerged from this work is not a collection of brands, but a single, well-orchestrated system. Each brand now plays a precise role within a unified ecosystem led by one medical authority, allowing growth without fragmentation or dilution of trust.
subtext.hr: Ono što je nastalo iz ovog rada nije zbirka brendova, već jedan dobro orkestriran sustav. Svaki brend sada igra preciznu ulogu unutar unificiranog ekosustava predvođenog jednim medicinskim autoritetom.

label.en: Fully booked for months in advance through a single ad campaign
label.hr: Potpuno zauzeto mjesecima unaprijed kroz jednu reklamnu kampanju
kozmetičkih proizvoda uspješno dizajniranih i lansiranih

label.en: increase in website traffic for Polderm year-over-year
label.hr: povećanje prometa na web stranici Polderma od godine do godine

statLabel.en: Fully booked for months in advance through a single ad campaign

label.en: increase in website traffic for Polderm year-over-year

heading.en: Marketing Excellence That Works On Your Terms
heading.hr: Marketinška Izvrsnost Koja Radi na Vašim Uvjetima

subtext.en: Because great marketing doesn't stop — it evolves. Whether you need a website that books guests, a video that tells your story, or a full creative system that scales with you — we're here to help your brand stay relevant, consistent and alive.
subtext.hr: Jer sjajan marketing ne staje — on evoluira. Bez obzira trebate li web stranicu koja rezervira goste, video koji priča vašu priču ili potpuni kreativni sustav koji raste s vama.
